title: SpecTestabilityAuditorOutput
description: Testability Auditor output. The agent scans SADS acceptance_criteria fields and emits manual_resolution_items for criteria that cannot be directly automated as tests or whose evidence category cannot be determined. It also emits evidence_assessments classifying each spec row's expected test evidence as tier_1 or tier_2. An empty manual_resolution_items array means all criteria are testable and evidence categories are clear.

evidence_assessments.description: One entry per spec row where the agent is confident about the evidence category. Rows where the agent is uncertain are omitted here and instead produce a manual_resolution_item with field='evidence_category'.

item_id.description: Unique identifier for this resolution item (e.g. TEST-001).

title.description: Short human-readable summary of the testability issue.

spec_id.description: Identifier of the spec row with untestable criteria.

field.description: 'acceptance_criteria' for untestable criteria items; 'evidence_category' when the agent cannot determine which evidence tier applies to the spec row.

untestable_reason.description: Explanation of why the existing acceptance_criteria cannot be automated.

suggested_improvement.description: Agent-proposed rewrite of the acceptance_criteria in automatable form.

options.description: Resolution options presented to the user.

spec_id.description: Identifier of the spec row being assessed.

evidence_category.description: Specific evidence type produced when this criterion is verified. Tier 1 (machine-generated): test_execution_record, audit_trail, system_log, defect_report, build_version_record. Tier 2 (human-captured): ui_screenshot, screen_recording, serial_debug_log, network_packet_capture, database_export, api_response_log, performance_profiler_output.

rationale.description: One-sentence explanation of why this evidence tier applies to the acceptance criterion.

option_id.description: accept_suggestion: apply suggested_improvement; let_agent_edit: call spec_editor for a custom rewrite; skip: leave original unchanged.

effect.description: Short description of what choosing this option does.
